message:
feat(storage): Add EventQuery API and property-based tests

Extend storage capabilities with flexible event querying and add
comprehensive property-based testing using proptest.

EventQuery API:
- New EventQuery struct for filtered event retrieval with options:
  limit, pane_id, rule_id, event_type, unhandled_only, since/until
- get_events(): Query events with filters (async, read-only)
- count_unhandled_events_by_pane(): Aggregate unhandled counts per pane
- get_last_activity_by_pane(): Most recent segment timestamp per pane

Internal query functions:
- query_events(): Build dynamic SQL with parameterized filters
- query_unhandled_event_counts(): GROUP BY pane_id aggregation
- query_last_activity_by_pane(): MAX(captured_at) aggregation

Property-based tests (proptest):
- prop_seq_monotonic_per_pane: Verifies sequence numbers are strictly
  increasing within each pane across arbitrary write sequences
- prop_fts_finds_inserted_text: Any valid search term inserted as
  segment content is findable via FTS
- prop_fts_respects_pane_scope: Content inserted in pane A is not
  found when searching scoped to pane B

Test configuration optimized for CI: 50 cases per test, bounded
shrink iterations, deterministic temp DB paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
